implementation_summary.summary: CP00-878 closes the RP29 Commercial Readiness validation-error, review-required, approval-required, blocked-claim, rollback/retry, unit-test, permission/audit binding, and synthetic fixture entrypoint rows across RP29.P02.M04.S13-RP29.P02.M06.S08. It adds descriptor-only validation-error mapping, review-required routing, permission/audit no-write binding, and synthetic fixtures for tenant, Matter, permission, audit, happy-path, and secondary-workflow evidence while keeping CI/CD, deployment, permission decisions, audit writes, runtime receipts, real client data, credentials, and secrets closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-878 RP29.P02.M04.S13-RP29.P02.M06.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
